description: The Locale Settings component is part of the Settings system and controls the platform's language.

fields.PrimaryInterfaceLocaleCode: The primary language for the UI.
fields.CultureLocaleCode: The locale code for the primary language, Ex: "en_us", "ru", or "pl_PL"
fields.UseImperialUnits: Whether to use Imperial or Metric units regardless of language selection.

methods.SetCurrentLocale: Called when the set current locale button is touched.

usage: Not used directly by the user.
